barRaise.topFinding: Twenty-first review, second straight healthy verdict. Nothing regressed and nothing new broke. The board is exactly the two MEDIUMs from 06-15, both AI-owned and neither blocking 1.0: the worker/src/index.js monolith (still 5,510 lines, an explicit post-1.0 split) and the dashboard audit block, which only refreshes at release time. That second item widened slightly this cycle: the dashboard JSON still points its audit pointer at CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-06-14 while clean 06-15 and 06-16 audits sit on disk, and Get-LatestAudit still never parses the high/medium/low counts. It stays MEDIUM and stays benign only because both newer audits are genuinely clean. One small win: the browser-tab title em-dash flagged last cycle is gone (index.html now uses a middot). No commits landed in the day since the last review, which is fine here: the remaining 1.0 gates are Nick-gated (counsel, Lighthouse, strategy seeding) and the AI-side board is housekeeping. Keep shipping; clearing the dashboard audit-refresh item is the highest-value chore left.
